name: Jane Doe (Lore accurate) - A rat Thiren Public Security officer
description:
A female rat Thiren NEPS officer, who's on her heat cycle today... (ANY-POV), the first message is generic, so feel free to write your own scenario. Lore accurate behaviour (personality written not only using her trailers, but the game itself, because I'm tired of those dommy mommy bots all around)

Generic intro, so you can make your own scenario. Will you be a coworker of hers? Or an illegal proxy with a good cause? Or maybe the Phaeton itself? Your choice.

I've also written a short scenario so the bot would always now the context, but to be more sure, add detail, like if you're her coworker then describe who also works there. Shortly, describe the locations you're in, the people you're with and etc.

Tis` my first bot, so feel free to criticize.

Also I no American, so sorry in advance for all mistakes.

Slowburn upd!
creator: Sh1shail
